'''Thesme''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Thesme system/Legends|Thesme system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. An industrial world, it served as the lackluster sector capital of [[Thesme sector/Legends|Thesme sector]], on the [[Thesme Trace]].

==History==
Thesme was represented in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] by [[Silya Shessaun/Legends|Silya Shessaun]]. In the years leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] was often called upon to return to the world to mediate territorial disputes in the sector.<ref name="DBSS">{{DB|character|silyashessaun|Shessaun, Silya}}</ref>

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a bounty was put up on Thesme for the capture of the [[Zygerrian/Legends|Zygerrian]] slaver [[Marko Tyne]].<ref name="THW">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swminis/article/huntwithin5|text=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Conclusion|int=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Conclusion}}</ref> Shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Princess [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] visited Thesme to pay her respects to the dying former Senator Shessaun.<ref name="DBSS" />
